title: How to lower a assert from firrtl.assert to verif.assert

features.name: procedural assert in always block
features.description: Code should include a procedural assert statement within an always @(posedge clock) block for sequential assertion checking

features.name: assert with reset condition
features.description: Code should include an assert statement with an active-low reset condition (~reset && cond) inside an always @(posedge clock) block
